ticket.subject: PostNord-Discontinued, updated and changed services
ticket.description:
Hi there!

 

It is time for PostNord to present Nordic changes that will take place 1st of May!

 

What is this?

You are hereby invited to take part in a webinar concerning the changes that will be implemented at the Nordic level regarding PostNord services. We will go through in detail what you as a partner need to consider and answer any questions or thoughts you might have.

 

How can I join?

Put the date and time February 19th 14.00-15.00 (Swedish time) in your calendar.

You can also add the link to the webinar in your own calendar notes.

A reminder will be emailed a couple of days before the webinar.

 

If I have some questions?

If you have any questions before the webinar, you are welcome to send us an email. Attached are also the changes that will apply starting May 1st for you to read. You can also send us questions after the webinar.

 

Is that all?

Remember, we are not making a traditional calendar invitation as there were problems on the last occasion and the meeting booking was cancelled for some participants. Also, feel free to send this invite to whom it may concern.

 

See you online 19th of February at 14:00. 😉

 

Presenter:

Christian Wankowicz, PostNord International

 

https://teams.microsoft.com/meet/32574219688339?p=drZGBVEfuWKVMyLO5O

Meeting-ID: 325 742 196 883 39

Password: eu2Ss93M

 

 

Best Regards

Carlos Brohlin/Martin Wennerholm

Digital Partner/e-Commerce

carlos.brohlin@postnord.com

martin.wennerholm@postnord.com

 

 

____________

 

PostNord Sverige

AO Paket/ Produktledning

SE-105 00 Stockholm

Sweden

 

Visiting address: Terminalvägen 24, Solna

 

We make everyday life easier.

PostNord provides solutions for communications, logistics, distribution and e-commerce to, from and within the Nordic region. Visit us at postnord.se (http://www.postnord.se/) .

Here is a reminder regarding tomorrows webinar starting at 14:00 Swedish time.😉

We will go through upcoming changes, updates and ending of some of PostNord services in the Nordics starting May 2026.



More info in your previous invite sent a couple of weeks ago.



Join by clicking the Teamslink: **:**https://teams.microsoft.com/meet/32574219688339?p=drZGBVEfuWKVMyLO5O

/_Carlos and Martin_

comments.body:
Hi,



Thank you to those attending the meeting today.



The new updated document is attached for all of you.

The same will be uploaded to developer.postnord.com tomorrow.

If you have any questions, please reach out to your local integration team:

Germany (z10): logistics.it.de@postnord.com
Denmark (z11): kundeintegration@postnord.com
Sweden (z12): kundintegration.se@postnord.com
Norway (z13): edi.no@postnord.com
Finland (z14): it.fi@postnord.com
International (ZDL): dluk.integration@intl.postnord.com

Also mentioned in the meeting, not added in the documentation:

You should not be able to choose INCO terms when using Postal shipments outside of the Nordics, if your clients can do that, please ensure that you remove that possibility.



Any feedback, please let us know by reaching out to our presenter:

**Christian****Wankowicz**

Integration Specialist



T  +46 10 436 03 90

Christian.wankowicz@postnord.com

**__________**

**PostNord International**
Group Operations & IT

Terminalvägen 24

SE-171 73 Stockholm

Sweden
www.postnord.com

**Whatever the destination. We deliver.**



**Från:** Carlos Brohlin, PostNord <Carlos.Brohlin@postnord.com>
**Skickat:** den 18 februari 2026 09:13
**Till:** Martin Wennerholm, PostNord <Martin.Wennerholm@Postnord.com>; Christian Wankowicz, PostNord <christian.wankowicz@postnord.com>
